'''Roan Fel's private quarters''' were located on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. In [[130 ABY]], [[Roan Fel]] encountered [[Morrigan Corde|Nyna Calixte]] spying on them, but she saved his life by alerting him of the [[One Sith|Sith's]] betrayal. He and his escort escaped to [[Sublevel 12]] while [[Darth Krayt]] and his Sith went after [[Roan Fel's double|his decoy]].
